revision.comment: templatestyles
ws
pull in more from common.css
add styles here
add 30em, 25em, and remove support for non-ordered lists
inherit like a normal human
remove font-sizes; .references is set in common.css these days.
Undid revision 1009977290 by [[Special:Contributions/Izno|Izno]] ([[User talk:Izno|talk]])put those back
column sizes

Protected "[[Template:Reflist/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: gonna start this at template prot cause I'm doing a limited rollout in some places ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
small
Changed protection level for "[[Template:Reflist/styles.css]]": match parent ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:Reflist/styles.css]]
removed protection template
Protected "[[Template:Reflist/styles.css]]": Highly visible template ([Edit=Allow only administrators] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only administrators] (indefinite))
add protection template
[[phab:T361659]] feel free to remove if this is not needed.
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1216960609|1216960609]] by [[Special:Contributions/Jon (WMF)|Jon (WMF)]] ([[User talk:Jon (WMF)|talk]]) it's not needed
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Reflist/styles.css]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:Reflist/styles.css]]
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Reflist/styles.css]]
1 revision imported: importing templates
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
1 revision imported: importing the refn stuff to try to fix the Okinawa article
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
13 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Reflist/styles.css]]: importing because this actually has redlinks for a lot of the articles
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css

move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css

move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css
1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:32:24 on [[Template:Reflist/styles.css]]
ws
pull in more from common.css
add styles here
add 30em, 25em, and remove support for non-ordered lists
inherit like a normal human
remove font-sizes; .references is set in common.css these days.
Undid revision 1009977290 by [[Special:Contributions/Izno|Izno]] ([[User talk:Izno|talk]])put those back
column sizes
small

move font-size to @media screen so we can remove it from MediaWiki:Print.css

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
9 revisions imported: importing this back, idk why it was lost

Update to reduce differences in behavior between {{reflist}} and <references/>. See talk. Note, if this breaks some custom styles you have, likely they were already broken with <references/> and you should take this opportunity to update them.
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

Update to reduce differences in behavior between {{reflist}} and <references/>. See talk. Note, if this breaks some custom styles you have, likely they were already broken with <references/> and you should take this opportunity to update them.

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
